projects.name: openclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.summary_zh: 生产级多平台AI网关 | 形式化验证驱动
projects.summary_en: Production-grade multi-platform AI gateway | Formally verified
projects.recommendation_zh: 适合高安全、多渠道AI助手部署
projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for secure, extensible multi-channel AI assistants
highlights_zh: 形式化模型一致性检查与CI

projects.name: openclaw-android-node-apk
projects.description: OpenClaw Android Node Companion APK auto release🦞
projects.summary_zh: Android Node 伴侣 APK 自动发布 | 基础设施生产级
projects.summary_en: Android Node Companion APK Auto-Release | Production-Grade Infrastructure
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐用于 OpenClaw 自托管 Android 节点部署
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for self-hosted OpenClaw Android node deployment
highlights_zh: 多阶段 Docker 构建、SHA256 锁定与缓存优化
CI/CD 完整，自动上游同步与冲突规则处理
highlights_en: Multi-stage Docker with SHA256 pinning and cache optimization
Full CI/CD with automated upstream sync and custom conflict rules
concerns_zh: Android 签名依赖 GitHub Secrets 配置
上游同步采用自定义规则，冲突处理需长期维护
concerns_en: Android signing requires GitHub Secrets configuration
Upstream sync uses custom rules requiring ongoing maintenance

projects.name: openclaw-android-assistant
projects.description: 🦞 AnyClaw — OpenClaw + Codex CLI running natively on Android. Two AI agents in one APK. No root. No Termux.
projects.summary_zh: Android嵌入式双AI代理 | 自包含高扩展APK
projects.summary_en: Embedded dual-AI agents on Android | Self-contained extensible APK
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐移动AI开发者用于代理部署
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for mobile AI agent deployment
highlights_zh: 多阶段Docker可重现构建与缓存优化
自动化CI/CD及上游同步机制
highlights_en: Multi-stage reproducible Docker with cache optimization
Automated CI/CD and upstream sync mechanism
concerns_zh: 全权限模式与嵌入Linux提取存在潜在稳定性风险
concerns_en: Full-access mode and embedded Linux extraction carry stability risks
